_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: The induction of merlin levels was observed initially at the concentration of 5 μM on day 2, and the peak level appeared at 10 μM on day 3. The expression of cyclinD1 was dramatically reduced
details: Induced merlin levels initially at 5 μM on day 2, with peak level at 10 μM on day 3; dramatically reduced cyclinD1 expression
